# Sprint 12 Regression Corpus

This directory marks the synthetic regression corpus used by Sprint 12 quality-gate tests.

The executable corpus is generated from `examples/synthetic_corpus/transcript/synthetic-demo.json`
through `imprint example`, then validated with `imprint validate-export` and compared with
`imprint diff`.

No private data, real source paths, account identifiers, credentials, or raw private exports belong
in this directory.
